title: GLM-5.2 (W4AFP8 · SGLang)
description: GLM-5.2 (753B MoE, W4AFP8) as an OpenAI-compatible serverless endpoint on SGLang v0.5.14. DeepGEMM cache baked in for warm inference; register-first handler beats the recycle window.

input.name: Model checkpoint (HF repo)
input.description: W4AFP8 checkpoint to serve. The default is public - no token needed.

input.name: Tensor-parallel size
input.description: Must equal GPU count (4 for this model on H200).

input.name: Max context length
input.description: Up to 1048576; 32768 is a fast default. Larger context needs more KV-cache VRAM.

input.name: Trust remote code
input.description: Required - GLM-5.2 ships custom modeling code.

input.name: Disable shared-experts fusion
input.description: Required for the W4AFP8 MoE path.

input.name: Extra sglang.launch_server args
input.description: Passed through verbatim. --cuda-graph-max-bs 16 trims cold-start graph capture.

input.name: Disable NCCL shared memory
input.description: Required for multi-GPU tensor-parallel inside a RunPod container (the 64MB /dev/shm is too small).

input.name: Hugging Face token (optional)
input.description: Only needed if you point MODEL_NAME at a GATED repo. The default checkpoint is public - leave blank. Never bake a token into the image.
